"not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Test results are calculated based on given answers. \n\nFor better and more accurate test results follow the test guidelines. Some of them include holding the device at arm's length, keeping your head straight and the device in front of your eyes or removing glasses/contact lenses before starting the tests. \n\nDon't use guesswork during the tests: if you don't see the answer, or are uncertain, don't try to guess for better test results.If your test results are different from your general eye checkup results or from a previous eye test, carefully read the hints to make sure you follow the guidelines and retake the test. If the result repeats itself, you might have failed to follow all the guidelines or guessed some of the answers. \n\nNote: Tests aren't intended to replace complete ophthalmological checkups and the
